testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGenerateExecutionReportWithNonExistentSession
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.915 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.924 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Generating execution report for session session-123

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGetVirtualThreadExecutor
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.936 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithEmptyContext
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.938 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.939 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.939 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Local stream is empty for session session-123, treating as new worker

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithToolResult
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.941 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.942 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.942 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerRunWithNonExistentSession

tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner starting for session session-123 17:32:32.949 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner execution started for session session-123 17:32:32.949 [main] ERROR tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner execution failed for session session-123 java.lang.IllegalStateException: Session not found: testcase.name: testMasterRunnerRunWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.952 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.952 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner starting for session null

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.953 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.953 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session null

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerShutdown
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.955 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.955 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Shutting down WorkerRunner virtual thread executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithValidSessionNewWorker
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.956 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session session-123 17:32:32.958 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.958 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Local stream is empty for session session-123, treating as new worker 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner for session session-123 is resuming from suspension: false 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- New worker session, performing initialization 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Initial context injected for session session-123 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Starting ReAct loop for session session-123 17:32:32.958 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Fetched 0 messages from local stream for session session-123 17:32:32.959 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner ReAct loop completed for session session-123

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithMixedMessage
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.965 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.965 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.965 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithEmptySessionId
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.968 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.968 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session is resuming from suspension

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerConstructorWithValidParameters
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.970 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerRunWithEmptySessionId
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.971 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.972 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner starting for session

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerGetVirtualThreadExecutor
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.973 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithValidSessionResumingWorker
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.974 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session session-123 17:32:32.975 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner for session session-123 is resuming from suspension: true 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Resuming from suspension, skipping initialization 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Starting ReAct loop for session session-123 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Fetched 1 messages from local stream for session session-123 17:32:32.975 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner ReAct loop completed for session session-123

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithTextMessage
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.977 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.977 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 17:32:32.977 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message does not contain ToolResult, treating session session-123 as new worker

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerShutdown
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.979 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.979 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- Shutting down MasterRunner virtual thread executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGenerateExecutionReport
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.981 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.982 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Generating execution report for session session-123 17:32:32.982 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Execution report generated for session session-123

testWorkerRunnerRunWithNonExistentSession

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerGenerateExecutionPlanWithWrongStatus

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 17:32:32.997 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 17:32:32.997 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session null is resuming from suspension
